name: cdn_empty_env
description: FastEdge CDN application for integration tests - getEnv on uninitialized env (CC-08 regression coverage). Built in DEBUG mode intentionally: AS release/optimize masks the WASI env init trap that this test exists to catch. Debug build matches the validator + visual-debugger profile users actually hit.

scripts.copy:empty-env: npx cross-env NAME=empty-env npm run mv:file
